infotexts.entitydescription.brpengineeruniform: The insulated boots and cut-resistant fabric would've been innovative eighty years ago.
infotexts.entitydescription.brpmechanicuniform: Sturdy and warm, these old-fashioned uniforms date back to the third colonial expansion.
infotexts.entitydescription.brpassistantuniform: "Boredom makes men to villains. The only medicine is drink. Keeps them sailors happy, keeps 'em agreeable, keeps 'em calm."
